pixie.scene: Balancing on a teacup-sized lily, sprinkling dew into it like wine.
pixie.flavor: They offer you a sip; refusing may be rude.

pixie.scene: Weaving a cloak from spider silk and moth wings.
pixie.flavor: Best not touch without asking.

pixie.scene: Giggles from inside a hollow acorn, where they’re playing hide-and-seek.
pixie.flavor: They peek to see if you’ll play along.

pixie.scene: Dancing in a circle of mushrooms, leaving glowing footprints behind.
pixie.flavor: If you join, they expect a gift in turn.

pixie.scene: Balancing on your shoulder, trying to braid your hair without permission.
pixie.flavor: Do you allow their mischief?

pixie.scene: Flying in loops, scattering flower petals like confetti.
pixie.flavor: They shower you in blossoms as a greeting.

pixie.scene: Hiding inside a teapot, peeking through the spout.
pixie.flavor: They giggle when discovered.

pixie.scene: Holding a lantern made from a glowing firefly jar.
pixie.flavor: They guard it fiercely, daring you to touch.

pixie.scene: Offering candied beetles on a silver thimble.
pixie.flavor: It would be ungracious to refuse.

pixie.scene: Tying ribbons onto branches to make a maypole.
pixie.flavor: Join in, and they’ll ask for a ribbon from you too.

pixie.scene: Humming a lullaby to put a hedgehog to sleep.
pixie.flavor: The hedgehog snores softly, oblivious.

pixie.scene: Painting leaves with shimmering dust to make them glow.
pixie.flavor: They warn you not to smear their work.

pixie.scene: Fluttering around with a tiny parasol made from a buttercup.
pixie.flavor: They twirl it dramatically, then bow.

pixie.scene: Balancing acorns on each other in a precarious tower.
pixie.flavor: They dare you to try adding one more.

pixie.scene: Carving faces into mushrooms to make lanterns.
pixie.flavor: The carved fungi grin eerily at you.

pixie.scene: Chasing after a dragonfly much larger than themselves.
pixie.flavor: They shout insults at the insect as it escapes.

pixie.scene: Guarding a circle of toadstools from intruders.
pixie.flavor: They warn you not to step inside.

pixie.scene: Whispering secrets to a stone and then throwing it into a pond.
pixie.flavor: They ask for a secret from you as well.

pixie.scene: Riding on the back of a squirrel like a knight on a steed.
pixie.flavor: They salute dramatically with a twig-sword.

pixie.scene: Sprinkling glittering dust into your hair.
pixie.flavor: They claim it’s a blessing; brushing it off is rude.

pixie.scene: Guarding a stash of shiny buttons hidden in a hollow log.
pixie.flavor: They hiss if you reach toward it.

pixie.scene: Juggling thimbles filled with nectar.
pixie.flavor: They toss one your way as an invitation.

pixie.scene: Racing dragonflies across a meadow.
pixie.flavor: They beckon you to bet on the winner.

pixie.scene: Stealing crumbs from your pack when they think you’re not looking.
pixie.flavor: They giggle when caught, but don’t stop.

pixie.scene: Offering to paint your cheeks with shimmering designs.
pixie.flavor: They expect a story or song in return.

sprite.scene: Untangling strands of silk strung between trees, humming softly.
sprite.flavor: Step wrong, and they’ll cry theft.

sprite.scene: Tending to a wounded squirrel with gentle hands.
sprite.flavor: They glance at you as if to ask for help.

sprite.scene: Guarding a satchel of glowing berries, wings twitching defensively.
sprite.flavor: Their glare dares you to touch.

sprite.scene: Perched on a mushroom, blowing a dandelion puff at you.
sprite.flavor: The fluff tickles your nose; do you laugh?

sprite.scene: Inviting you to share a bowl of nectar, poured into a walnut shell.
sprite.flavor: It’s polite to sip before speaking.

sprite.scene: Chasing fireflies with a net, laughing when they escape.
sprite.flavor: They ask if you’d like to join the chase.

sprite.scene: Standing guard over a ring of mushrooms, wings glowing faintly.
sprite.flavor: They forbid you from stepping inside.

sprite.scene: Sewing a tiny flag from flower petals and grass threads.
sprite.flavor: They wave it proudly when you approach.

sprite.scene: Sharing berries between themselves, then offering you one.
sprite.flavor: Refusing would mark you as unfriendly.

sprite.scene: Writing messages on leaves with glowing ink.
sprite.flavor: They scowl if you reach for their work.

sprite.scene: Singing in harmony with a bird perched nearby.
sprite.flavor: The bird falls silent as you arrive.

sprite.scene: Offering you a crown woven of grass and daisies.
sprite.flavor: They expect you to wear it with pride.

sprite.scene: Hovering above a puddle, watching their reflection ripple.
sprite.flavor: They wonder aloud what yours looks like.

sprite.scene: Carrying an acorn cap filled with shimmering dust.
sprite.flavor: They warn you not to spill it.

sprite.scene: Tying twigs into arrows for a tiny bow.
sprite.flavor: They boast of their accuracy.

sprite.scene: Inviting you to join a game of tag in the underbrush.
sprite.flavor: If you win, they’ll demand a prize.

sprite.scene: Balancing pebbles into a tiny cairn.
sprite.flavor: They hiss if you try to topple it.

sprite.scene: Offering to guide you along a hidden trail.
sprite.flavor: They’ll expect a token of thanks later.

sprite.scene: Telling riddles to a fox, who seems amused.
sprite.flavor: They invite you to try answering one.

sprite.scene: Gathering raindrops into a gourd, carefully sealed.
sprite.flavor: They prize each drop as treasure.

sprite.scene: Flying in formation like a squadron, then breaking apart dramatically.
sprite.flavor: They laugh at your startled expression.

sprite.scene: Serving honey drops on oak leaves.
sprite.flavor: They beam when you taste one.

sprite.scene: Guarding a pile of acorns painted in bright colors.
sprite.flavor: They growl if you touch their stash.

sprite.scene: Asking you to whistle a tune so they can learn it.
sprite.flavor: They insist on a fair trade of music.

sprite.scene: Stringing beads from berries into a necklace.
sprite.flavor: They hold it up to see if you admire their work.

satyr.scene: Struggling to wrestle a fish as big as he is out of a stream.
satyr.flavor: If you help, he’ll expect a song in return.

satyr.scene: Playing pipes under a willow, mortals dancing around him entranced.
satyr.flavor: Joining the dance means owing a gift.

satyr.scene: Pouring mushroom wine into carved gourds, beckoning you closer.
satyr.flavor: They won’t talk business until you drink.

satyr.scene: Juggling apples stolen from who-knows-where.
satyr.flavor: Will you call out the theft, or play along?

satyr.scene: Arguing with a fox over who composed a bawdy song first.
satyr.flavor: The argument pauses when they notice you.

satyr.scene: Leading a goat in elaborate ribbons, boasting of its lineage.
satyr.flavor: They guard it jealously.

satyr.scene: Offering roasted chestnuts skewered on sticks.
satyr.flavor: They press one into your hand eagerly.

satyr.scene: Teaching frogs to sing in chorus with his pipes.
satyr.flavor: The frogs croak tunelessly, making him laugh.

satyr.scene: Proclaiming himself judge of a spontaneous dance contest.
satyr.flavor: If you join, you must wager something.

satyr.scene: Guarding a jug of strong cider, refusing to share.
satyr.flavor: He dares you to try and take it.

satyr.scene: Singing bawdy songs too loudly, drawing attention.
satyr.flavor: He grins when you notice.

satyr.scene: Offering you a seat at his feast of roasted roots and cheese.
satyr.flavor: He won’t take no for an answer.

satyr.scene: Bragging of his prowess in wrestling and demanding challengers.
satyr.flavor: He insists on a prize for the victor.

satyr.scene: Chasing after runaway goats, cursing their names.
satyr.flavor: He waves for you to help catch them.

satyr.scene: Guarding a lyre with strings of moonlight.
satyr.flavor: He warns you not to touch his treasure.

satyr.scene: Inviting you to toast with him under the stars.
satyr.flavor: He won’t share secrets until the toast is done.

satyr.scene: Boasting of a great prank played on a dryad.
satyr.flavor: He waits to see if you laugh along.

satyr.scene: Offering roasted mushrooms dipped in honey.
satyr.flavor: He insists you taste before passing.

satyr.scene: Asking you to judge a song duel between him and another satyr.
satyr.flavor: Your judgment will cost you neutrality.

satyr.scene: Sleeping drunk against a tree, clutching a wineskin.
satyr.flavor: Do you dare take it?

satyr.scene: Clapping his hooves to make the ground shake rhythmically.
satyr.flavor: He beckons you to dance along.

satyr.scene: Inviting you to drink from his carved horn.
satyr.flavor: He beams if you accept.

satyr.scene: Arguing whether wine or song is the greater gift.
satyr.flavor: He asks for your opinion.

satyr.scene: Dancing wildly in a meadow, scattering wildflowers.
satyr.flavor: If you join, he demands you share a secret.

satyr.scene: Guarding a cask of fey wine claimed from the Archfey’s court.
satyr.flavor: He warns you not to covet what’s his.

dryad.scene: Emerging from a tree trunk, petals in her hair, arms crossed.
dryad.flavor: She offers fruit from her tree; refuse and she wilts.

dryad.scene: Caring for a sapling, watering it with her tears.
dryad.flavor: She gestures for your waterskin.

dryad.scene: Warning you not to carve your initials in her bark.
dryad.flavor: Her voice sharpens with authority.

dryad.scene: Braiding vines into a hammock between two trees.
dryad.flavor: She smiles, inviting you to rest.

dryad.scene: Conducting a choir of birds, who fall silent as you enter.
dryad.flavor: She expects your respectful silence.

dryad.scene: Guarding a grove where mushrooms glow softly.
dryad.flavor: She forbids you from picking any.

dryad.scene: Offering apples plucked from her branches.
dryad.flavor: She beams when you accept.

dryad.scene: Singing softly to heal a wounded deer.
dryad.flavor: She asks you for a song in return.

dryad.scene: Rooting her toes into the ground, drawing nourishment.
dryad.flavor: She sighs contentedly.

dryad.scene: Warning you away from a sacred spring.
dryad.flavor: She says it is not yours to touch.

dryad.scene: Offering shade beneath her boughs.
dryad.flavor: She gestures for you to sit.

dryad.scene: Beseeching you to carry seeds to distant soil.
dryad.flavor: She offers blessings if you agree.

dryad.scene: Guarding a carved idol hidden in her roots.
dryad.flavor: She warns of curses if you touch it.

dryad.scene: Dancing with a breeze, her vines swaying gracefully.
dryad.flavor: She smiles when you watch.

dryad.scene: Handing you a blossom that never wilts.
dryad.flavor: She watches to see if you treasure it.

dryad.scene: Asking you to fetch water from a distant brook.
dryad.flavor: She says she will repay your kindness.

dryad.scene: Cautioning you not to burn fallen branches.
dryad.flavor: She claims even deadwood is hers.

dryad.scene: Singing with cicadas in harmony.
dryad.flavor: The buzzing intensifies at her gesture.

dryad.scene: Offering you honey gathered from her hive.
dryad.flavor: She insists it sweeten your lips.

dryad.scene: Begging you to chase off lumbering boars rooting her soil.
dryad.flavor: She says she’ll owe you greatly.

dryad.scene: Displaying carvings of mortals in her bark.
dryad.flavor: She says each one is a debt owed.

dryad.scene: Inviting you to share in her evening song.
dryad.flavor: She expects you to hum along.

dryad.scene: Requesting a tale of your homeland.
dryad.flavor: She promises to share a secret in return.

dryad.scene: Frowning at a broken branch on her bough.
dryad.flavor: She insists you mend the harm somehow.

dryad.scene: Cupping her hands to offer you water pulled from the roots.
dryad.flavor: She waits for you to drink.

quickling.scene: Zipping around, stealing buttons and dropping them in a pile.
quickling.flavor: The pile clearly belongs to them now.

quickling.scene: Running laps around you, tugging at your pack straps.
quickling.flavor: If you swat, they’ll demand payment for the insult.

quickling.scene: Stuffing stolen pastries into their mouth, crumbs flying everywhere.
Dashing through puddles to splash you deliberately.
Holding out a shiny coin they claim to have found — yours, perhaps?
quickling.flavor: They expect you to trade, not demand.

quickling.scene: Tying your bootlaces together while you stand still.
Filling your pockets with pinecones before darting away.
Snatching your hat, racing in circles.
quickling.flavor: They dare you to catch them.

quickling.scene: Pulling the tails of passing animals.
Dropping a frog into your pack before vanishing.
Rearranging your belongings when you look away.
Balancing on your weapon’s tip for a split second.
Tickling your ear with a feather darted past.
Snatching food from your plate mid-bite.
quickling.flavor: They demand a chase for it back.

quickling.scene: Drawing rude shapes in the dirt faster than you can blink.
Shouting secrets about you they couldn’t possibly know.
quickling.flavor: They expect you to confess one too.

quickling.scene: Spinning your cloak into knots.
Snagging your quill or chalk to scrawl nonsense notes.
Offering to deliver a message but demanding three tokens.
Blowing raspberries as they dash through your hair.
Hiding shiny objects in your boots overnight.
Challenging you to a race across a meadow.
quickling.flavor: They expect a prize if they win.

quickling.scene: Tying ribbons to your weapons while you’re distracted.
Carving your name (incorrectly) into a tree before vanishing.
quickling.flavor: They claim ownership of the error.

quickling.scene: Offering to spy for you in exchange for sweets.
quickling.flavor: They hold out their tiny hand expectantly.
